failure_modes: a follow-on 3-run repeat attempt failed in preflight under restricted execution context with Operation not permitted and was not accepted as bench evidence
conclusion: The bounded STM32 GPIO loopback self-check path is live-pass on the unified STM32 capability fixture. Firmware drives PA8, samples PB8, and exports GPIO-valid status on PA4 for machine-checkable external verification.
does_not_prove: repeat-pass stability on unrestricted bench runs
general GPIO framework behavior beyond this bounded self-check
EXTI or timing/capture behavior on PA8->PB8
anchor_impact: Upgrades the STM32 GPIO loopback self-check path from design-confirmed to live-pass on the primary STM32 sample-board capability anchor.
notes: PA8->PB8 is treated as an internal digital self-check loopback.
PA4 remains the main external machine-checkable proof line.
PA5->P0.1 remains optional auxiliary observation only.
